name: Rewards Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Incremental retail spends above ₹20,000 per month

domestic: 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per calendar quarter

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year
4,000 reward points (worth ₹1,000) on payment of annual renewal fee if spend threshold is not met
additionalBenefits: 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per calendar quarter
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Earns 4 reward points per ₹150 spent on retail spends up to ₹20,000 per month (0.67% return value). 1 point = ₹0.25.
Earns 8 reward points per ₹150 spent on incremental retail spends above ₹20,000 per month (bonus capped at 2,000 points per billing cycle).
Government and insurance spends earn 1 reward point per ₹150 spent (0.17% return value).
Fuel spends are completely excluded from earning rewards.
